content.query:
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM NET.TransactionAccountingLine TL LEFT JOIN NET.Account A on TL.Account=A.ID
--WHERE amountpaid=86940
WHERE [transaction] IN (315626, 310496, 326293, 342126, 311962, 310294, 310304, 333466, 310269, 315629, 310284, 331164, 315618, 
                        327710, 311952, 311957, 311935, 341773) and account is not null

SELECT TOP 100 trandate, tranID, otherrefnum, entity, account, amount, amountpaid, amountunpaid
FROM NET.NetSuiteTransaction TR LEFT JOIN NET.TransactionAccountingLine TL on TR.id=TL.[transaction] and TL.account=120
WHERE [id] IN (315626, 342135, 298155, 334428)

SELECT TOP 100 *
FROM M3_OOHEAD
WHERE CUOR='012600119137'

SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/NetsuiteVT/Entity.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
WHERE id=304509

-- This is auto-generated code
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/NetsuiteVT/Backups/customerAddressbook.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
WHERE entity=304509

-- This is auto-generated code
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/NetsuiteVT/entityAddressbook.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
WHERE entity=304509

-- This is auto-generated code
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/NetsuiteVT/Backups/CompanyAddressbookEntityAddress.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
WHERE addressee LIKE '%Newman%'
